Quick actions

Business settings

Slug, description, and contact details for your booking page.

Lowercase letters, numbers and hyphens.

Link preview

Business profile & booking page

Most fields are not live until you tap Save Changes at the bottom. Logo and cover uploads save to your account immediately when upload finishes.

Make your booking page feel like your app — logo, colors, and contact info. Customers only see the live page, not this editor.

Profile logo

Appears on your booking page hero. JPG, PNG or WebP, max 3 MB.

Cover image (optional)

Recommended: 16:9 wide image. This appears as the background of your booking page.

JPG, PNG or WebP, max 3 MB. If empty, a premium gradient is used.

No cover — gradient default

Business profile

Core details from setup — update anytime. Customers see name, phone, and links on your booking page.

Shown under your name on the booking page — e.g. “Premium cuts in Skopje”.

Contact & location

Working hours & availability

Set when customers can book. These hours apply to your public page and calendar.

Working days

Select the days your business is open.

09:00
17:00
Optional overrides for specific weekdays

Use this only if some days have different hours.

Booking window

Choose how far into the future customers can book appointments.

Minimum notice

How much notice customers must give before booking.

Break between appointments (optional)

No break set

Extra time between appointments for preparation or cleanup.

— : —
— : —
Recurring bookings

When enabled, customers can repeat the same appointment weekly, every 2 weeks, every 3 weeks, or every 4 weeks.

Allowed repeat intervals

Choose which repeat schedules customers can pick.

Max repeat duration

How long a recurring series may run at most.

Non-working days & holidays

Block custom closed days and optionally block public holidays for your country.

Choose closed days manually

Select one or more dates, or a date range, to mark as non-working days.

Your closed days

Booking limits

Control how many appointments a client can book.

Client approval

Control who can book with your business.

If approval is required, new clients must be approved before they can book. If accepting new clients is off, only approved existing clients can book.

Branding

Used on your booking page buttons, links, and highlights.

Live preview

Hero preview updates as you edit. Full booking flow is on your public link.

Share your booking page

Lowercase letters, numbers and hyphens. Saved with Save Changes.

Availability

Working hours

Working days, open/close times, booking window, minimum notice, and breaks are edited in Business profile & booking page.

Recurring bookings

Configured in Business profile & booking page → Working hours & availability.

Non-working days & holidays

Custom closed days and public holiday blocking are edited in Business profile & booking page.

Booking Business setup · ~5 minutes

Step 1 of 5 — Business

1Business 2Services 3Hours 4Staff 5Go live

    What happens next

    The name customers will see when booking.

    Industry / business type

    Choose the category that best matches your business.

    Customers can use this number to contact you.

    Additional Business Details (Optional)

    You can complete the rest of your business profile later.

    Social media

    Service icon (optional)
    Choose an icon
    Duration

    Use any duration, for example 20, 40, or 75 minutes.

    Choose the days you’re open, set your usual hours, and tell us how far ahead customers can book. You can change any of this later.

    Working days

    Select the days your business is open.

    Apply these hours to all selected days

    Default window for every working day you select — adjust in 15-minute steps (− / +).

    09:00
    17:00
    Optional: override hours on specific weekdays

    Closed by default — turn on only when a day differs. Everything else keeps the default schedule above.

    Break Between Appointments (Optional)

    Add extra time between appointments.

    Example:
    A 15 minute break gives you time to prepare, clean up, or get ready for the next customer.

    — : —
    — : —

    Choose how far into the future customers can book appointments.

    Example:
    If you select 3 months, customers can book any available time up to 3 months from today.

    How much advance notice do you need before a customer can book?

    Example:
    If you choose 2 hours, customers cannot book appointments starting in less than 2 hours.

    Optional step — add teammates only if customers should choose who they book with. Solo owners can tap Save & continue with an empty list.

    ?

    Optional — JPG, PNG or WebP, max 3 MB.

    Almost done — choose how your page looks, copy your link or QR, then finish to start accepting bookings.

    What customers see

    Share your booking page

    Quick share

    ✓

    You’re live — customers can book now

    Share your link or QR. New bookings appear in your dashboard calendar.

    • Business name and booking link
    • Services customers can book
    • Working hours and availability rules
    • Public booking page style

    Next: open your dashboard to see bookings, or test the page yourself with “Open booking page”.

    Your progress is saved. You can finish logo, services, and hours anytime in Business Settings.

    Help & Support

    Need help with your booking or account?

    Privacy Policy

    XBOOK respects your privacy. Your account information and booking data are used only to provide booking, reminder, and account services. We do not sell your personal data.

    Full Privacy Policy coming soon.

    Questions? Contact xbooksupport@gtwebstudio.com.

    Terms of Service

    By using XBOOK, you agree to use the service responsibly and keep your booking information accurate. Businesses manage their own availability, services, and appointments.

    Full Terms of Service coming soon.
